image_a7fb3012b7d45b.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"P(C\\text{抽到丙})=\\underset{A\\text{抽到甲}}{\\left(\\frac{1}{4}\\times\\frac{2}{3}\\times\\frac{1}{2}\\right)}+\\underset{A\\text{沒抽到甲}}{\\left(\\frac{2}{4}\\times\\frac{1}{2}\\times\\frac{1}{2}\\right)}=\\frac{5}{24}","note":"機率公式，分A抽到甲與未抽到甲兩情形"}

image_ad48f231ae35ab.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"P(A'\\cap B')=P\\left((A\\cup B)'\\right)","note":"機率與德摩根律公式"}

image_b2aa4792dd764f.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"P(\\text{第三次取到白球})=\\frac{4}{15}","note":"第三次取到白球的機率"}

image_b3b8d921629154.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=P(A)+P(B)-P(A\\cap B)","note":"集合聯集機率公式右半部"}

image_ee44b4981d72ee.png.note: 條件機率公式與數值計算
image_ee44b4981d72ee.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"P(A\\mid B)=\\frac{P(A\\cap B)}{P(B)}=\\frac{\\frac{1}{6}}{\\frac{1}{3}}=\\frac{1}{2}","note":"條件機率公式與數值計算"}
